name: Truckstop Freight Matching & TMS API
what_it_does: Truckstop REST API for freight brokerage and carrier matching platform. Enables AI agents to manage load posting and carrier search on the load board, handle rate and spot pricing data, access carrier identity verification and FMCSA compliance data, retrieve freight market rate intelligence, manage load tracking and visibility, handle digital broker and carrier contracting, access freight payment and quick pay data, retrieve capacity and lane analytics, and integrate freight matching with TMS and shipper platforms.
use_cases: Managing load posting and carrier matching from freight brokerage automation agents
Accessing spot market rates and pricing from freight intelligence agents
Retrieving carrier verification and FMCSA compliance from carrier vetting agents
Integrating freight matching with TMS platforms from logistics automation agents
not_for: LTL (less-than-truckload) without FTL (full truckload) and spot market focus
International freight forwarding without domestic US trucking focus
Small parcel without freight and truck capacity management
best_when: A freight broker, shipper, or TMS provider using Truckstop wants AI agents to automate load matching, carrier search, spot rate pricing, capacity management, and carrier compliance verification.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Automated load tendering commits real freight commitments and financial obligations. Rate automation must reflect current market conditions. Carrier verification automation must not override FMCSA compliance checks. Freight payment automation must have approval workflows.

auth.notes: Truckstop uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Broker and carrier-level credentials with load board, rates, and compliance scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for load and carrier events. Partner integration program.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — freight brokerage subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly subscription plans; API access requires higher tiers
pricing.notes: Nampa, Idaho. Founded 1995. Major US freight load board and matching platform. 70,000+ carriers and brokers. $10B+ in loads matched annually. Formerly ITS (Internet Truckstop). Competes with DAT Solutions for US freight matching. Strong FMCSA carrier compliance database. Truckstop Group includes MyCarrierPackets (carrier onboarding).

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Automated load tendering commits real freight obligations — require broker approval workflow
FMCSA carrier compliance is critical — never automate tendering to carriers without valid authority and insurance
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key REST API with developer portal
Spot market rates are volatile — automated rate decision automation must handle rapid market changes
Carrier identity verification must be thorough — freight fraud (double brokering) is a significant risk
Quick pay and freight payment automation must have approval controls — real financial transactions
agent_readiness.security_notes: Freight and carrier data. SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. FMCSA compliance and freight fraud prevention.

security_score_components.security_notes: Freight matching data. SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Carrier fraud prevention.
